detail.description: Hunter Feduccia singles on a ground ball to right fielder Weston Wilson.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a ground ball to left fielder Randy Arozarena.
Hunter Feduccia homers (2) on a fly ball to right center field. Richie Palacios scores.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a soft bunt ground ball to third baseman Blaze Alexander.
Hunter Feduccia homers (1) on a fly ball to center field.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a line drive to center fielder Colton Cowser. Richie Palacios to 2nd.
Hunter Feduccia hits a ground-rule double (2) on a fly ball to right field.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jesús Sánchez.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a fly ball to shortstop Willy Adames.
Hunter Feduccia doubles (1) on a line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee, deflected by first baseman Rafael Devers.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a soft ground ball to pitcher Simeon Woods Richardson. Hunter Feduccia to 2nd. Hunter Feduccia advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by pitcher Simeon Woods Richardson.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a ground ball to third baseman Ke'Bryan Hayes.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a line drive to center fielder Lane Thomas.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a line drive to left fielder Isaac Collins.
Hunter Feduccia triples (1) on a fly ball to right fielder Kameron Misner. Richie Palacios scores.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a line drive to center fielder Leody Taveras.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Leody Taveras.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a ground ball to center fielder Leody Taveras.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a ground ball to right fielder Matt Wallner. Richie Palacios to 3rd.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a line drive to right fielder Matt Wallner. Ben Williamson scores.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jo Adell. Richie Palacios scores.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a ground ball to first baseman Alec Burleson. Carson Williams to 3rd.
Hunter Feduccia doubles (3) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Andy Pages. Victor Mesa Jr. to 3rd.
Hunter Feduccia doubles (5) on a fly ball to center fielder Ceddanne Rafaela.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Owen Caissie.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a line drive to right fielder Bryan Reynolds. Richie Palacios scores. Jonny DeLuca scores.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a line drive to center fielder Luisangel Acuña.
Hunter Feduccia singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jesús Sánchez.
